installation_bundle.approval_prompt: Install all missing 3080-brief Feishu dependencies listed in this plan? One approval covers every listed CLI command and host-native companion Skill registration action.
installation_bundle.on_approve: Execute every listed approval command and host-native registration action; stop on the first failure, reload the agent when required, then rerun the dependency check from the normal runtime.
installation_bundle.on_decline: Keep 3080-brief installed for non-Feishu output, install no optional Feishu dependency, and keep the Feishu path BLOCKED.
excludes: Node.js installation when no exact platform command is known
